description_long: This object is a rectangular snack box with a predominantly pink and white color scheme. The front face features a large, stylized letter 'K' in white, along with pixelated images of stick-shaped snacks and a bowl, suggesting a sweet or dessert-like product. The box has a glossy finish, with the top and bottom edges highlighted in a deeper pink. The sides are solid pink with a gradient effect, lacking any visible text or graphics. The packaging appears to be made of cardboard, typical for snack boxes, and is likely lightweight and easy to carry. The overall design is vibrant and eye-catching, suitable for attracting attention in an urban retail environment.
description: A glossy, rectangular pink and white snack box with stick snack graphics and bold branding on the front.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main branding, snack images, and a large white 'K' on a pink and white background.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a solid pink gradient with no visible graphics or text.
description_view_2: Rear/front view, visually identical to the front, with the same branding and snack graphics.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, also showing a solid pink gradient with no graphics or text.
attribute_brand_logo: A large white 'K' on the front face, upper left, with pink background; no other clear logo visible.
attribute_flavor_indication: Pixelated image of a bowl and stick snacks on the front, possibly indicating a sweet or dessert flavor, but no explicit flavor text visible.
